findings: No automatic restart logic for failed workers; launcher does not relaunch dead panes
Task state preserved only via filesystem workflow (claim by mv, atomic result write)
Cleanup limited to teardown: kill PIDs, remove PID files, kill tmux session
CLI recovery options limited to --teardown, --dry-run, --preflight; no --resume/--restart
Dead-worker recovery/re-queuing NOT implemented in stampede.sh; monitor only reports
Metaswarm records commander launch failures but no automatic restart/requeue
